texto: The sudden growl that went through the air had both of us stopping in our tracks. "Did you just growl at me?" How dare him growl because I wanted to take a bath in the lake. Okay, I didn't want to take a bath in the lake but if I did it was none of his business!

texto: Her little chin lifted and I could see the fierceness in her eyes that told me she was angry. Her pupils dilated and her skin flushed. I wondered if she would look just as beautiful when she was in the throws of passion.
